description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Trading endpoints for placing, querying, and canceling futures orders. Requires SIGNED authentication.
Send in a new futures order. Supports LIMIT, MARKET, STOP, STOP_MARKET, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET, and TRAILING_STOP_MARKET order types.

query.description: (Required) Futures trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.
Position side for hedge mode. BOTH for one-way mode.
Time in force. Required for LIMIT orders.
Reduce only flag. Cannot be sent with closePosition.
A unique ID among open orders.

description.content: Endpoints for managing user data stream listen keys for futures.
Start a new user data stream for futures. Returns a listen key that can be used to subscribe to user data WebSocket streams.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Keepalive a user data stream to prevent timeout.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Close out a user data stream.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Binance USD-S Margined Futures API enables trading of USDT and BUSD margined perpetual and delivery futures contracts. Developers can place leveraged long and short positions, manage margin and leverage settings, query funding rates, and access futures-specific market data including mark price, index price, and open interest.

Contact Support:
 Name: Binance Support
